series_metadata.series_title: Weekly holdings reconciliations of custodial STAR Ohio accounts
series_metadata.series_description: A packet of documents that includes a report from the investment inventory software that shows all holdings for STAR Ohio assets held by funds for which the Treasurer acts as custodian. This report is then reconciled against a statement provided by the STAR Ohio administrators. STAR Ohio is an acronym for State Treasury Asset Reserve of Ohio, which is a local government investment fund offered by the Treasurer''s office pursuant to R.C. 135.45.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
